body.content:
Dear Claudia, 

 

1.	Original 2 containers to maintain from CN to HOD OFT --> reexport charges from JIB to NEW POD would be updated under FCA filing

Ans > if want to maintain the OFT from CN to YEHOD, just need to manually add the surcharge to the original booking.

 

2.	The new container to only have the reexport OFT from JIB to NEW POD --> which by right should be under FCA filing. 

Ans > FCA filing can be CN to SOBBO. In case of any local surcharge of DJJIB, it has to be added manually due to POL is not DJJIB in the new booking route.

Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
Digital & IT Department
E-mail: catherinekang@culines.com <mail
Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 

发件人: Cla
